input.tenant_message: I plugged my phone charger into the outlet next to my bathroom sink and it sparked at me. There was a visible flash and a small popping sound. The outlet still works but I'm too scared to use it. I took a video but I'm attaching photos for now.

ai_output.recommended_action: Send a licensed electrician urgently to inspect and replace the outlet. Sparking at the point of plug insertion — especially near a bathroom — suggests a faulty outlet, moisture ingress, or missing GFCI protection required by code in wet locations. Advise tenant not to use the outlet under any circumstances until it is inspected and cleared.
